{{Infobox location
| name = Dreadgod's hand
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dreadgod's hand]] is located near a large stone wall at the edge of a town.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] possesses the [[Dreadgod's hand]] in a case.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has a [[Dreadgod]] hand in a sling.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
